short.en: Printed dovetail plate that fits standard Arca-Swiss clamps — backup for when the metal one walks away.
short.sl: Natisnjena lastovičja plošča za standardno Arca-Swiss objemko — rezerva, ko kovinska izgine.

description.en: Dovetail angle is the well-documented 45°; 1/4"-20 captive nut takes the camera screw. Held a 1.5 kg DSLR + lens during a forest hike without slipping. Not a precision metal replacement — but it gets the shot.
description.sl: Kot lastovičjega zatiča je dobro dokumentiranih 45°; matica 1/4"-20 sprejme vijak fotoaparata. Drži 1,5 kg DSLR + objektiv med pohodom skozi gozd, brez zdrsa. Ni precizna kovinska zamenjava — vendar reši trenutek posnetka.
